parents.subject: LU-20096 ldlm: alloc stats before procfs

commit.subject: LU-12648 utils: print lcme_timestamp in ISO8601 format
commit.message:
LU-12648 utils: print lcme_timestamp in ISO8601 format

Have "lfs getstripe" the component lcme_timestamp in ISO8601 format
for ease of parsing and sorting, rather than in the default "date"
format, which has no useful properties at all.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Change-Id: Ie0ca871a54cd9b989f578ef0aba595eb29500c1e
